title: ECINET ensures seamless operations, faster reporting and enhanced cybersecurity
content:
60/2026-2027

General Elections to Legislative Assemblies and Bye-elections 2026

ECINET ensures seamless operations, faster reporting and enhanced cybersecurity

Dated Aizawl the 6th May, 2026 :Election Commission of India’s (ECI) robust IT platform ECINET played a central role in streamlining election processes including real-time monitoring, enabling faster reporting, and enhancing transparency during the General Elections to Legislative Assemblies and Bye-elections 2026.

Since its official launch in January 2026, ECINET app has witnessed a significant surge in usage and has over 10 crore downloads till date. The beta version of ECINET was used in Bihar elections in November 2025.

On poll-days, i.e., April 9, 23 and 29, ECINET recorded over 98.3 crore hits and on the counting day i.e. May 4, 2026, ECINET recorded an average of 3 crore hits per minute.

ECINET cybersecurity protocols resulted in effectively countering over 68 lakh malicious hits on counting day originating from both within India and overseas, targeting key election platforms, including the results portal.

In a significant step towards enhancing security at the Counting Centres, a new QR code–based Photo Identity Card system was used for the first time on counting day across all States/UTs in these elections through ECINET.

On counting day, over 3.2 lakh QR codes were generated to ensure that only authorised personnel could access counting venues, thereby preventing any unauthorized entry in the Counting Centers.

title: DM&R  MINISTER  Prof. LALNILAWMA LEH AIZAWL WEST II BIALTU MLA  LEH MINISTER NI BAWK PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR TEN DINTHAR LEH TUIKUAL SOUTH- A LEIMIN A HMUNAH AN ENFIAH

Dinthar vengah hian  Pu Hmingthana in sak lai chu a hmunah an enfiah a, Local Council hruaitu ten lei chet tan dan te lo hrilhhriain;   Zonal Officer in hma an lo lak tan tawh dan hrang hrangte a sawifiah a, Inspection Team te nena an zirchianna atang chuan a rang thei ang bera thiah a tulthu  sawiin,  Z O chuan lirthei veivak pawh a chhehvelah tihtlem a tulthu a sawi bawk . Geology  & Mining lama mithiamte pawhin lei chet tan dan chinchang chu Minister te hi lo hrilhin,  uluk taka hmalak a nih chuan a chhehvelte tan harsatna liantham thlen lo a Pu Hmingthana in sak lai hi  thiah theih a nih ngei an beisei thu an tarlang bawk.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma  chuan Geologist te  leh  Disaster lama official te kaihhruaina hnuaiah  tih tur tul chu tih vat  a ngaih thu In neitu leh  concern official  te a hrilh bawk. Minister chuan Pu Hmingthana in sak lai bakah a chhehvel a in ding lai te pawh an  enfiah  bawk.

Dinthar veng an enzawh hnu hian Minister te hian Tuikual South lama leiminna  hmun an enfiah leh a, Local Council hruaitu te leh DM& R official ten chhiatna lian zawk a thlen lohna tura an hmalak dan leh an hmachhawp te Minister hi an lo hrilh a. Minister te chuan  District Disaster Management Authority (DDMA) te, QRT te, Local Council  te, DM&R official te, Geology & Mining  Department official te leh khawtlang hruaitu te hnenah  lawmthu sawiin,Khuarel chhiatna a lo thlen chang a, rang taka an che chhuak thin leh chhiatna lian zawk a thlen loh nana thei tawp chhuaha hma an la vat thin chu ropui an tih thu sawiin, lawmthu an sawi bawk. Minister te hian Furpui kan hma chhawn turah Khuarel chhiatna thleng thei lakah mipui mimir pawh  kan fimkhura kan  inralrin reng a pawimawh thu an sawi bawk.

title: MIZORAM POLICE ‘YEAR OF DISCIPLINE’ HAWNNA NEIH A NI
content:
403/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 6th May 2026:Mizoram Police chuan kum 2026–2027 “Year of Discipline” atana a puan hawnna inkhawm chu vawiin chawhma khan G.S. Arya Mess, Police Headquarters, Khatla, Aizawl-ah Home Minister Pu K Sapdanga’n a hmanpui.

Pu K Sapdanga chuan Discipline chu Police-te tan chuan an neih makmawh a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram ralmuanna chu ngaia nei a, inthlahdah mai lo tur leh, remna a awm zel theih nana tan lak zel a tul thu a sawi. Police-te chu an tawngkamahte, an cheziaahte, leh an nungchangahte inthunun tha turin a fuih a. Mipuite rinngama Police-te an awm phawt chuan mipuite pawhin dan zawm an ngaih pawimawh ngei a rin thu a sawi.

He hmalakna atana inkaihhruaina leh hmachhawp pawimawh tak tak awmna lehkhabu, “Mizoram Police Model Guidelines for Year of Discipline 2026–2027 (Core Principles and Specific Areas of Focus)” chu Khuallian hian a tlangzarh nghal a ni.

Mizoram DGP Pu Sharad Agarwal a pawhin thu sawiin, Discipline chu Police Service zung pawimawh a ni a ti a. Rinawmna leh inpekna nena hna thawk theuh turin Police-te chu a fuih a ni.

'Year of Discipline' lungphum leh thlur bik turte (Core Principles and Specific Areas of Focus) chu:

- Hun vawn dik, mahni hnaa rinawm, leh thahnemngai taka mawhphurhna hlen chhuah- Hnathawh dan kalphung inkaihhruaina vawn dik, document vawn dik, dan zawm that, leh thubuai chhui (investigation) a hun taka tihfel- Hna chungchanga nungchang mawi vawn, mipui nena indawrnaah inthliar hranna awm lova rualkhai taka chet, mi harsa leh chak lo zawkte hriatthiamna neih- “Train to Excel” programme hnuaia taksa hriselna leh engtik lai pawha che chhuak thei tura inbuatsaih- Turnout fel tak nena parade, drill leh endikna (inspection) neih thin- Police hmunhma hrang hrang (establishment) te fai taka vawn leh enkawl- Sorkar bungruate uluk taka enkawl leh chumi chungchanga mawhphurhna lak- Rinawm, dik leh lang tlang taka hna thawh, leh- Hotuten an hnuaia mite hnathawh vil that te an ni.

He hunah hian IGP, DIG, AIG, SP leh Commandant zawng zawng, Principal, Police Training School leh Aizawl-a Police officer hrang hrangte bakah, Home Department-a official lian leh sawm bik mi thahnem tak an tel a. AIGP (Headquarters) Pu David H Thanglianan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: Legislative Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama’n Agilus Diagnostics Ltd. a hawng
content:
402/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Legislative Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama chuan Kulikawnah natna hrik zawn chhuah leh enfiahna Agilus Diagnostic Ltd. a hawng a, “Mizoram tana rahbi thar kan kaina ni a ni” a ti.

Pu Lalbiakzama chuan Ram leh hnam hmasawn tur chuan a chhunga chengte hriselna dinhmun a tha tur a ni a, “Kan hriselna dinhmun kan hriat a, enkawlna tha kan dawn thuai hi sum tam tak senralna laka min vengtu a ni”, a ti. Agilus Diagnostics Ltd chuan Aizawl-ah Branch leh sample collection point hawn belh zel a tum bakah District hrang hrangah hetiang hawn belh zel tum a ni chu a lawmawm hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Agilus Diagnostics Ltd. hi SRL Diagnostics tih a ni thin a. India rama diagnostic network lian leh rintlak ber zinga mi niin kum 1995 khan din a ni a. Kum 29 zet ram mipuite hriselna endik leh damdawi lam hna (diagnostic excellence) an lo thawk tawh a ni. Kum 2024 khan 'Best Diagnostics Chain of The Year' leh kum 2023-ah 'National Diagnostics Chain of The Year' chawimawina lo dawng hial tawh an ni a.

Agilus Diagnostic Ltd. hi mipui tana awlsam leh man tlawm zawk leh rintlak zawk tura ruahman a ni a. Mamawhtute tan awlsam zawka anmahni dawr theih nan Agilus app leh website-ah a book theih a, Test result-te awlsam takin a en theih a, mobile-ah thawn nghal zel thin a ni bawk.

Agilus Diagnostics Ltd. hian natna hrik zawn chhuah leh enfiahna (Accurate Diagnosis) test chi hrang hrang 3,600 chuang an nei a, chung zingah chuan Pathology (thisen, zun, etc.), Radiology (X-ray, Ultrasound), leh Molecular Diagnostics (genetics leh cancer enfiahna) te a tel a, an laboratory tam tak hi NABL leh CAP accredited an ni.

title: Lungleiah Bawrhsap hovin Lunglei District leh Lungsen Aspirational Block-a zirna kaihhnawiha hma lakna hrang hrang thlir ho a ni
content:
401/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 6:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin a hna thawh pindanah Lunglei Deputy Commissioner (Bawrhsap) hma laknaa Lunglei District leh Lungsen Aspirational Block-a zirna tihhmasawnna tura hma lakna hrang hrang kalpui mekte thlir ho niin, hma lak zel dan tur sawi ho a ni.

He hunah hian kum hmasa lama District Administration leh Education Department ṭang kawpa hma lakna hrang hrang thlir let niin, kumin pawh hian hma lak chhunzawm leh ni se tih a ni a. "Be DC for a Day" tih hnuaia zirlai naupangte'n ni khat atan DC dinhmun an luah chhinna chu May thla chhung hian kalpui leh tum niin, zirlai naupang 10 thlan chhuahte pualin he hun hi hman tura ruahman a ni.

Kum 2025–2026-a DISHA Foundation nen ṭang kawpa Lungsen Aspirational Block huam chhung school 10-a hlawhtling taka English hriat thiamna leh zirna online-a training, ELF Programme kalpui tawh chu kumin hian kalpui chhunzawm tum niin, school 15 – Lungsen Block aṭangin school 10, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huam chhunga school 3, Bunghmun Block aṭangin school 1 leh Tlabung Block aṭangin school 1 thlan tura ruahman a ni.

Back-to-School Programme hnuaia school naupang eng emaw harsatna avanga school kal zawm ta lo (drop out)-te zawn chhuah a, school an kal zawm leh theih hram dan zawnpui bakah, mipuiin zirna bansan an awm leh awm loh an report zung zung theih nana QR Code siam chu kalpui chhunzawm ni se, school headmaster-te kal tlangin a theih ang anga school-a hruai let leh tura hma lak leh ni se tih a ni.

Book-Nest Initiative hnuaia kum liam taa Lungsen Aspirational Block puala Lunglei khawpui chhunga lehkhabu khawn khawm a, school hrang hranga sem chu a hlawhtlin thu leh school naupangte'n an ṭangkaipui thu ngaihthlak a ni a. Kumin hian kalpui chhunzawm leh ni se, nodal department-ah UD&PA ni se, tih niin, June thla aṭanga hma la ṭan tura ruahman a ni.

Lunglei District-a Cosmic Classroom pathum (Lunglei, Lungsen leh Tlabunga awmte) chu hawn hun bi siamin, school naupang tam thei ang berin an tlawh theih nana hma lak chhunzawm ni se, tih a ni a. Project Period Pride hnuaia tleirawlte'n hmeichhe thla bi thi neih chungchang zahpui lo va, thil pangngai a nihzia leh hemi chungchang an hriat chian lehzualna tura school hrang hranga naupangte tana hma lakna chu June thla ral hmain school thlan chhuah pathumah hun buatsaih leh ni se, tih a ni a. Moneywise hnuaia zirlai naupangte'n sum leh pai ṭangkai leh dik taka an hman thiam theih nana financial literacy lama hma lakna chu June thla ral hmain school thlan chhuah pathumah kalpui leh ni leh se, tih a ni bawk.

Hei bakah hian school thlan bikte pualin kuminah "40 Days Campaign" kalpui thar tura ruahman niin, hei hi school naupangte'n hriselna chungchangah te, chaw ṭha ei chungchangah te, naupang himna lamah te leh zirna kaihhnawih dangah te hawi lam dik an neih theih nana hma lakna tura duan a ni a. SOP hi tun thla chhunga peih fel hman tura beisei niin, school 1st term exam zawh lama hma lak ṭan tum a ni.

title: AWARENESS PROGRAMME ON BIS ISI MARK CERTIFICATION FOR MANUFACTURERS OF VARIOUS INDUSTRIES NEIH A NI
content:
400/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 6th May, 2026 :Vawin khan BIS Guwahati Branch leh Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department tangkawpchuan Directorate of Economics & Statistics, MINECO ah Mizoram chhunga industry neituhranghrangteleh Co-operative Societies engemawzat tan an hnathawhna leh thanchhoh zelna tur atana pawimawh em em Awareness Programme on BIS ISI Mark Certification for manufacturers of various industries hun hman a ni.

He hun hi Pu Ravi Dadhich, IAS, Secretary FCS&CA Department chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Khuallian chuan kalkhawm mipuite chu an hnathawh pawimawh tak chu hlawkthlak zawk leh changtlung zawka thawkchhuak tur chuan dan leh dun awm ang angte an hriatchian a ngaih thu leh hemi atana vawina BIS Guwahati Branch leh FCS&CA Deparmenthma lakna zar a awareness program pawimawh tak an nei thei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu te, India rampum ang pawha Kut hnathawktute chu economic sector pawimawh tak awptu an nih thu leh taima tak leh chenfaktlak a hnathawk zel turin a chah a. An thil tharchhuah/siamchhuahte chu rampawna thawnchhuah tlak quality tha a nih theihnan  inzirbelhn gaihna lai ah tei nzirbelh nachang hre zel turin a chah bawk a. Mizorama MSME Industry thang zelah quantity aia quality an ngaih pawimawh zawk a ngaih thu leh Made in India scheme kal zelah Made in Mizoram an uar deuh deuh a tul thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Technical Session hun ah hian BIS Guwahati Scientist te atangin topic 3 thlan chhuah bik – Overview on BIS & BIS Care App, ISI Mark Certification Procedures leh Product-Specific standards on sectors such as steel, furniture, AAC blocks and PVC Pipes tih hmangin power point presentation leh saizauna hun hman a ni a, kalkhawm mipuite atangin zawhna leh chhanna hun hlawkthlak tak hman a ni bawk.

Pi Saizikpuii, Director, FCS&CA Department hnen atnagin fuihna thu leh lawmthu sawina hun in he programme hi khar a ni.

Vawin programme ah hian AMC area chhunga sector hrang hranga Industry nei mi 60 vel an kalkhawm a ni.

title: Mizoram Governor Visits Sainik School, 14 Assam Rifles and Shalom Special School in Serchhip District
content:
59/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 6th May, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), visited Serchhip District today and interacted with cadets, students, teachers, ex-servicemen and security personnel at three key institutions. The Governor spent the day visiting Sainik School Chhingchhip, the headquarters of 14 Assam Rifles in Serchhip, and Shalom Special School in Serchhip.

At Sainik School Chhingchhip, he was warmly received by Brig. Puspendar Sorayan, DIG, 23 Sector Assam Rifles and the School Vice Principal, Lt. Col. Kartik Sood, AEC. Addressing teachers, staff and cadets, the Governor congratulated the school on the achievement of two cadets who successfully cleared the National Defence Academy (NDA) entrance examination. He extended his best wishes for their future endeavours. Expressing satisfaction with the overall progress and development of Sainik School Chhingchhip, he urged the Principal, teachers and staff to continue their dedicated efforts.

General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh described Sainik Schools as institutions that nurture capable and outstanding individuals. He encouraged the cadets to strive for excellence in their chosen fields, whether in the Armed Forces or any other career, and to become agents of positive change. Highlighting the nation’s need for strong future leaders, the Governor called upon the cadets to dream big, maintain discipline, stay committed to their goals and contribute meaningfully to society and the nation.

Later, the Governor visited the headquarters of 14 Assam Rifles at P&E Veng, Serchhip, where Commandant Col. Archit Goswami, SM, briefed him on the unit’s activities. He interacted with ex-servicemen, students from Govt. Serchhip College and security personnel. During the interaction, he advised the students to stay away from drugs and substance abuse and encouraged them to be honest, responsible and hardworking in whatever profession they choose.

The Governor then visited Shalom Special School in New Serchhip, where he interacted with teachers and students and distributed gifts. He was briefed on the school’s functioning by Principal Mrs A. Lalawmpuii. She expressed appreciation to the Governor and the Assam Rifles for their continued support and assistance to the institution. In recognition of his continued concern and support for Shalom Special School, a citation of appreciation was also presented to the Governor.

Shalom Special School was founded on August 17, 2005, by former Chief Minister Mr. Lal Thanhawla. The foundation stone of its present building was laid in January 2010 by the Governor during his tenure as Eastern Army Commander, with construction later carried out by the 4th Battalion of Assam Rifles under its Military Civic Action programme.

At present, Shalom Special School in Serchhip has an enrollment of 36 specially abled students.

title: ICT MINISTER-IN ‘GOVERNMENT ONLINE EXCELLENCE AWARDS, 2025’ A HLAN A; MIZORAM SORKAR CHU ‘DIGITALLY EMPOWERED’ STATE-AH A CHANG MEK, A TI
content:
396/2026-2027

Aizawl, May 6, 2026: Vawiin khan Taxation Auditorium, MINECO-ah Information, Communication & Technology (ICT) Department buatsaihin Mizoram sorkar hnuaia Department hrang hrang leh zirna in te tana buatsaih “Government Online Excellence Awards, 2025” sem a ni a. ICT Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana chu khuallian niin Award te hi a sem a ni.

Khuallian Dr. Vanlalthlana chuan innovation leh mipui rawngbawlna lama official te thawh rah lawmna hun pawimawh tak an hmang thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. IT hmasawnna avanga mipuiin awlsam zawka tui, electric leh phone bill te an pek theih tawh thu sawiin, mipuite awlsamna tura online service pek chhuah kawngah an huang zauh zel turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni. ICT hmalaknain Mizoramah Artificial Intelligence Center of Excellence (AI-CoE) din tura proposal siam a nih tawh thu leh District zawng zawnga Mobile/Internet connectivity tha a awm theih nan Mizoram Fibre Grid Network thawh mek a nih thu Minister chuan a sawi bawk.

Dr. YLN Reddy, IAS, ICT Secretary chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, ICT Minister hmalakna hnuaiah Mizoram chu ‘Digitally Empowered’ state-ah a chang mek a, sorkar department leh office-ten IT an hman tangkai chho mek hi a lawmawm hle a ni, a ti.

Pu James Lalnunmawia, Chief Informatics Officer (CIO) chuan technical report a pe a, he award Gartner Maturity Model leh sorkar duan Web Monitoring System hmanga guidelines fel tak neia thlan an nih thu a sawi.

Government Online Excellence Awards dawngtu tur thlangtu Selection Committee leh Technical Evaluation Committee te siam niin, hengah hian ICT technical expert mai bakah MZU, NIC leh NIELIT te atangin expert an tel a. Official Departmental Website ah website 160 endik niin, Educational Institution Website atan hian website 50 endik an ni.

Endik zing atang hian Top 10 te hnenah lawmman hi hlan an ni a, pakhatna atanga pathumna te hi Citation leh Momento pek theuh an ni a, palina atanga sawmna te hian Citation an dawng theuh bawk a ni. Hengte hi Government Online Excellence Awards, 2025 lawmman latu te chu an ni.

title: Watershed Development Component-Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana 2.0 conference neih a ni.

396/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 6th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Aijal Club, Aizawl-ah Watershed Development Component-Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana 2.0(WCD-PMKSY 2.0) conference neih a ni a. Rural Development and Administration Department changtu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chu khuallian a ni.

Minister Prof Lalnilawma chuan PMKSY 2.0 chu September thleng pawh sei a ni a, a tawp tha taka an khar theih nan officer leh staff te tan la tur leh, an hmabak PMKSY 3.0 pawh mipui leh ram tana rotling thlentu a nih theih nan uluk lehzuala rilru seng turin a fuih. Sawrkar hmalaknaten rah tha zawk an chhuah theih nan Department dangte nena thawh ho a pawimawh thu Minister chuan sawi a; Department chhunga scheme hrang hrang an thawk a nih pawhin, sawt zawka hna thawk thei turin Department dangte nena thawhhona convergence felfai taka neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni. PMKSY chu kan ram tui hna tihpun nan te, chhiatrupna thleng thei laka kan him zawk nan pawh a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk. Minister Prof Lalnilawma chuan inkhawmpui chhimtu zawng zawngte chibai bukin, Mizoram mipuite hmasawn nan lungrual taka, pheikhai ruala, thahnemngai taka thawkho zel turin kalkhawmte a fuih a ni.

Vawiin programme hi chawhma leh chawhnu huna then niin, a then khatna hi Rural Development Additional Secretary Pu V. Lalengmawia’n a kaihruai a. Kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi. Pu K. Lalrohlua, Director, Rural Development chuan an hnathawh dan leh hmalakna hrang hrangte chipchiar takin a sawi a ni. WDC-PMKSY hmalakna hrang hrang thlirho niin, Award semna hun hman a ni bawk a. District leh Project hrang hrang ten WDC-PMKSY hnuaia an tharchhuah leh hmalakna Exhibition neih zui nghal niin, Minister hian stall te a tlawh a. He exhibition-ah hian WDC-PMKSY hnuaia hmalakna peng pakhat - Horticulture Development hnuaia thlai tharchhuah te; mimal tanpuina dawngtuten thiam thil an siam chi hrang hrang te bakah thlai thar sawngbawl (process) hnua an thil siam chhuah te pholan a ni.

WDC-PMKSY hian a tuam chin Project-ah ram leh leilung luangral tur ven leh humhalh te a thawk ber a. Hemi atan hian Natural Resource Management (NRM) chu kalpui niin Major Activity hrang hrang heng - Land Development, Soil & Moisture Conservation leh Water Harvesting Structure te hi kalpui a ni. Land Development hnuaiah hian Afforestation, Horticulture Development-te a hmalak a ni a; Boil & Moisture Conservation hnuaiah hian Terrace, Contour, Dunding, Checkdam leh Wet Rice Cultivation (WRC) siam hna te leh remchang dangte kalpui a ni bawk.

Water Harvesting Structure hnuaiah hian tuilakna leh dahkhawlna te, Percolation Tank leh Farm Pond te siam thin a ni a. Chumi atan chuan Programme/Scheme dang te nen pawh kalkawp tir (converge) thin a ni bawk. WDC-PMKSY 2.0 hian Springshed Development a hrut tel avangin NRM hnuaiah hian Springshed Development atana pawimawh hrang hrang Soil & Water Conservation activity nasa leh zuala kalpui a ni a. Recharge Zone-te zirchianna recharge structure hrang hrang siam thin a ni.

Project tuam chin khuaa mite zingah mi chhumchhia leh hmeithai, eizawnna mumal nei lote eizawnna tur ruahmanna Livelihood for Assetless leh Production System && Micro-enterprise a awm bawk a. Hengte hi Self Help Group leh mimal tanpuina anga kalpul a ni a, hmalakna tlangpui hi Poultry, Piggery, Petty Trade, Handicraft, Tinsmithy, Blacksmithy, Tailoring, Carpentry, Animal rearing leh a dang remchangahte hmalak a ni. Heng hmalakna reng reng hi village level-a Committee (Watershed Committee) emaw Gram Sabha kaltlanga thlan thin a ni. Institution & Capacity Building (I & CB ) hnuaiah hian project hnathawh kawng hrang hranga hmasawnna tur leh zirtirna pek ngai training kalpui thin a ni a. Heng training-te hi NIRD & PR leh SIRD & PR-ah te, KVK leh Institution dang remchangahte kalpui a ni a, SLNA leh DWCDC ten training hi an pe thin bawk.

Chawhnu lamah hian Business Session-a hun hman niin RD Joint Director Pi PC Zonuntluangi chuan kaihhruaiin Pu K. Lalrohlua, Director, Rural Development chuan thu a sawi a. WDC-PMKSY hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrang sawiho niin District tina Subject matter Specialist ten an district theuha 'Success Story' tarlarnna hun an hmang a. Business Session-ah hian hnathawh kawnga hmasawn zel dan tur ruahmanna hrang hrang bakah Service Matter-te sawiho niin Pu Lalthakima, Deputy Director, Rural Development chuan lawmthu sawiin Confenrece hi an tiak a ni.

title: KAN THINLUNG A HRISEL CHUAN HARSATNA NIA LANG HI REMCHANNA A LO NI FO ZAWK THIN - CHIEF MINISTER
content:
395/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th May 2026:Vawiin khan M. Suaka Hall, Durtlang Presbyterian kohhranah Samaritan Association for the Blind Special Blind School ten an school Silver Jubilee an lawm a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Pu Vanlalhlana, PWD Minister, bialtu MLA ni bawk chu khualzahawm a ni.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, taksa lama harsatna lian tak, chhuanlam remchang tak nei chunga zirna lama hlawhtlin tum naupangte an chhuanawm thu a sawi a. Thinlung hrisel tak pu zui tlat tura chahin, "Kan thinlung a hrisel chuan harsatna nia lang thil tam tak hi kan tan remchanna a lo ni fo zawk thin", a ti.

Mizoram mipui tam zawk chuan he School hlutzia leh tangkaizia hi an ngaihtuah ngai lo mai thei. Nimahsela, kan unau, Mit thalote tana a hlutna hi sawifiah thiam phak loh khawpa hlu a ni.

He school a lo awm hma zawng kha chuan Mizoramah mit thalote puala zirna in kan nei ngai lova. Samaritan Association for the Blind ten theihtawp chhuahin in han bei a, sorkar laipuite dawrin, Grant te in hai chhuak a, school in din ta a. Mit thalote tan beiseina meichher in rawn chhi eng a. An beisei ang ngeiin zirna tha an hmu a. Vawiinah chuan he School atanga zirchhuak mi hlawhtling tak tak sawi tur an lo awm ta fur mai a ni.

Sorkar pawhin a hlutzia a hriat avangin Adhoc Status a pe a. Zirtirtu a attach- a, tun kan sorkar hian Middle Section bik hi Provincialize tura ngaihtuah tur zingah kan dah a, PPP mode-a kalpui pawh a tha zawk thei, a ti.

Hostel Building pakhatah mipa leh hmeichhia in la awm khawm avangin Girls Hostel in mamawh tih kan hria a. Handholding atangin Hostel sakna tur hi Rs. 50 lakh kan ruahman fel tawh a ni.

Zirna lama in harsatna te, in mamawh dangte pawh inthlahrung lovin bialtu Minister hnenah te, Education Minister hnenah te, Social Welfare Minister hnenah te, ka hnenah pawh rawn sawi zel ula. Sorkar anga kan tih theih chi a awm a nih chuan tumah kan tlanchhe lo turah ka ngai a ni.

Kan chhehvel ramtea Mizoram tihmingthatu he school lo din a, tha taka enkawltu Samaritan Association for the Blind te chungah hian kan lawm em em a. A theih ang anga hmalakpui kan inhuam a ni, a ti.

Naupangte hnena Chief Minister thuchah tlangpuite:

1. An taksa lama harsatnate avanga beidawng mai lova, mi hlawhtling nih tuma zirna kawng an zawh avangin lawmthu a hrilh.

2. Digital Literacy ngai pawimawh turin a chah a, an zirlaipui dangte nena rualkhai taka an kal theihna hmanraw tangkai tak chu nal taka computer leh digital assistive device in hman theih hi a ni, a ti.

3. Rilru hriselna ngaipawimawh turin a chah a,Bible chuan thil dang zawng aia veng tha tura min chah chu kan thinlung hi a ni a, “nunna lo chhuahna” a ti a. Kan thinlung a hrisel chuan kan hmaa harsatna nia lang tam tak hi remchanna an lo ni zawk thin. Tunlai khawvelah chuan Problem tih tawngkam hi an hmang duh tawh mang lova Opportunity an ti tawh zawk thin. Thinlung hriselte tan chuan Problem hi Opportunity a ni reng a ni, a ti.

4. Tihpalh thila Pathian siam in ni lova, chhan leh vang ropui tak neiin a din zawk che u a ni tih hi ring ngam ang che u. In hmaah hlawhtlinna chang tawh in ute sawi tur tam tak in hriain ka ring. Nangni pawhin in ti ve thei ang tih hi ka ring a ni,tih te an ni a.

Khualzahawm Pu Vanlalhlana pawhin thusawiin, he school ka biala a awm hi ka chhuang a, a enkawltute chungah ka lawm a ni. In tan tih theih ka neih phawt chuan ka theihtawp ka chhuah zel ang. Tunah pawh MLA Fund atanga thawh theih project rawn nei ula, kan thawk dawn nia, a ti a. Tanpuina sum a hlan a ni.

Silver Jubilee lawmna inkhawmah hian Pastor Gospel Thanmawia chuan hunserh a hmang a. Pu RK Vanlalringa, Executive Secretary, Samaritan Association for the Blind chuan report a pe a. An association hi kum 1990 a din a ni a, Special Blind School hi kum 2001 May thla atanga bul an tan a ni. A kum hmasa berah zirlai 16 an awm a, a hnuah chuan kumtin zirlai naupang 30 nei ziah ang an ni a. Kumin bikah hian 35 awmin Mizoram bakah Tripura, Manipur, Assam leh Myanmar atangin an lo kal a ni. School-ah hian Primary atanga High School thleng a awm a, HSLC hi kum 17 chhung zaa zain an pass tawh a. He school-a zirchhuak mi 22 in sorkar hna an thawk tawh a ni. Sorkarin Adhoc status a pe a, Mathematics zirtirtu a attached a, zirlaibu leh an mamawh dang a tum thin bawk.

Zirlai naupangte hian mi thahnemngai tanpuitu (sponsor-tu) mimal, pawl leh kohhran an nei hlawm a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma pawh hian naupang pathum a sponsor mek a ni. Heng  zarah vawiin thlengin tluang takin lehkha hi an zir theih phah nia sawi a ni.

title: "A HEALTHY MIND TURNS CHALLENGES INTO OPPORTUNITIES” – CHIEF MINISTER
content:
58/2026-2027

Aizawl, 6th May 2026:The Silver Jubilee celebration of the Samaritan Association for the Blind's Special Blind School was held today at M. Suaka Hall, Durtlang Presbyterian Church. The Hon’ble Chief Minister of Mizoram, Lalduhoma, attended as Chief Guest, while Vanlalhlana, PWD Minister and local MLA, attended as Guest of Honour.

In his address, the Chief Minister spoke about the inspiring efforts of students who, despite significant physical challenges, pursue education with determination. He emphasized the importance of maintaining a healthy mind, stating, “When our mind is healthy, many things that appear as difficulties often become opportunities for us.”

He noted that many people in Mizoram may not fully realize the value and significance of this school. However, for visually impaired children, its importance is beyond description.

Before the establishment of this institution, there was no school in Mizoram dedicated to the education of the visually impaired. The Samaritan Association for the Blind worked tirelessly, sought support from the government, and established the school, bringing a ray of hope for visually impaired children and enabling them to receive proper education. Today, many successful individuals who studied at this school have emerged.

Recognizing its importance, the government has granted it Adhoc status, attached teachers, and is considering provincializing the middle section. The Chief Minister also stated that implementing it under a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) model could be beneficial.

He further highlighted the need for a separate girls’ hostel, as boys and girls are currently accommodated in the same hostel building. Under a handholding initiative, ₹50 lakh has already been earmarked for the construction of a hostel.

He encouraged the students and school authorities to freely communicate their difficulties and needs to the local MLA, the Education Minister, the Social Welfare Minister, or even directly to him, assuring that the government would make every possible effort to extend support.

He expressed deep gratitude to the Samaritan Association for the Blind for establishing and maintaining such an important institution, which has brought recognition to Mizoram beyond the state. He assured continued support from the government.

Key messages of the Chief Minister to the students included:

1. He congratulated them for not being discouraged by their physical challenges and for striving to achieve success through education.

2. He stressed the importance of digital literacy, stating that the ability to effectively use computers and digital assistive devices is crucial for keeping pace with others.

3. He emphasized the importance of mental well-being, noting that the Bible teaches us to guard our hearts above all else, as it is the source of life. A healthy mind transforms many apparent problems into opportunities. In today’s world, the term “problem” is increasingly replaced by “opportunity”—for those with a healthy mind, problems always become opportunities.

4. He encouraged them to believe that they are not created without purpose, but with a meaningful and significant calling. He expressed confidence that just as many before them have succeeded, they too can achieve success.

During the programme, Shri R.K. Vanlalringa, Executive Secretary of the Samaritan Association for the Blind, presented a report.

The Samaritan Association for the Blind was established in 1990, and the Special Blind School was started in May 2001. In its first year, the school had 16 students, and in subsequent years it has maintained around 30 students annually. This year, the school has 35 students, including those from Tripura, Manipur, Assam, and Myanmar.

The school provides education from Primary to High School level and has maintained a 100% pass rate in HSLC examinations for 17 consecutive years. A total of 22 alumni are now employed in government service.

The government has granted Adhoc status to the school, attached a Mathematics teacher, and continues to support it with textbooks and other essential needs. The students are supported by individual sponsors, organizations, and churches. The Hon’ble Chief Minister himself is currently sponsoring three students.

It was also stated that, with such support, the students have been able to continue their education smoothly to this day.

title: MIZORAM GOVERNMENT SIGNS MoU WITH MINISTRY OF JAL SHAKTI FOR IMPLEMENTATION OF JAL JEEVAN MISSION (JJM) 2.0 CHIEF MINISTER PARTICIPATES VIRTUALLY
content:
57/2026-2027

Aizawl, 6th May 2026:The Government of Mizoram and the Ministry of Jal Shakti, Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation, Government of India, signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) today for the implementation of Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) 2.0 in New Delhi.

Union Minister for Jal Shakti, C. R. Paatil, joined the programme virtually from his office. Hon’ble Chief Minister of Mizoram, Shri Lalduhoma, along with Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister, PHE, Mizoram and officials from the Public Health Engineering (PHE) Department, participated online from Aizawl.

On behalf of the Government of Mizoram, the MoU was signed by Smt. Zodingpuii, IAS, Secretary to the Government of Mizoram, while Smt. Swati Meena Naik, Joint Secretary, signed on behalf of the Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation, Government of India.

In his virtual address, the Chief Minister stated that Mizoram is among the first states in India to successfully achieve 100% implementation under the Jal Jeevan Mission, providing Functional Tap Water Connections to 133,060 households. All schools and Anganwadi Centres across the state have also been covered with Functional Tap Water Connections.

Out of 852 Water Supply Schemes sanctioned, 849 have already been physically completed, achieving nearly 99% completion. Additionally, 28 Water Testing Laboratories have been established across the state.

The Chief Minister expressed his satisfaction at signing the MoU for JJM 2.0 and emphasized that the mission will be effectively implemented in the state. He noted that it will play a crucial role in achieving the vision of a developed India (Viksit Bharat).

He also urged the Ministry to expedite the release of the pending Central share of funds for JJM, which has been due since December 2024.

title: Mizoram Larsap-in Sainik School, 14 Assam Rifles leh Shalom Special School-te a tlawh
content:
393/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 6th May, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan lehlangin Serchhip District a tlawh. Larsap hian Sainik School Chhingchhip, 14 Assam Rifles Serchhip leh Shalom Special School, Serchhip te tlawhin zirlai, zirtirtu, ex-servicemen leh sipaite kawmin hun a hmang a ni.

Sainik School Chhingchhipah hian Brig. Puspendar Sorayan, DIG, 23 Sector Assam Rifles leh Vice Principal Lt. Col. Kartik Sood, AEC ten Larsap hi an lo hmuak a. Zirtirtu, staff leh zirlaite fuihna thu sawiin, Sainik School Chhingchhip atanga zir chhuak zirlai pahnih ten National Defence Academy (NDA) a lut thei tura exam an paltlang chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, an kalzelna turah duhsakna a hlan a. Tunhnaiah Sainik School-in hmasawnna hrang hrang a hmu chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Principal, zirtirtu leh staff-te chu theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a chah a ni.

General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Sainik School chu mi tha leh danglam bik chher chhuahna tur hmun a nih thu sawiin, Armed Force-ah lut vek lo mahse, an kalna zawn theuhah chhawr tlak leh danglamna thlentu nih tum turin a fuih a. Ramin thalai nakin lawka hruaitu tha ni tur a mamawh tih sawiin, zirlaite chu danglam bik nih tum tur leh sang tak thlen tum turte, inthununna tha nei tur leh hlawhtlinna chang thei tura inpekna nunpui tlat turte, khawtlang leh ram tana chhawrnahawm tak nih tum turtein a chah a ni.

Vawiin vek khan Larsap chuan 14 Assam Rifles Headquarters, P&E Veng, Serchhip chu tlawhin, Commandant Col. Archit Goswami, SM chuan an hmalak dan a hrilhfiah a. Ex-Servicemen member, Govt. Serchhip College zirlai leh sipaite a kawm a. Zirlaite chu ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih laka fihlim tum tur leh eng hna pawh thawk se, rinawm leh taima taka thawk turin a chah a ni.

Hemi hnu hian Shalom Special School, New Serchhip tlawhin board member leh zirlaite a kawm bakah ei leh in tur a ken sakte a hlan a. Principal Pi A. Lalawmpuii hnen atangin school chanchin leh enkawl dan tlangpui ngaihthlak a ni a. Larsap leh Assam Rifles ten kawng engkima an ngaihtuah thin avangin lawmthu a sawi a. Shalom Special School tana a thawh hlawk em avangin Larsap hi chawimawina thuziak cheimawi an hlan nghal bawk.

Shalom Special School, Serchhip hi August ni 17, 2005 khan Chief Minister hlui Pu Lal Thanhawla'n a din a. Tuna an school building ni ta sakna tur lungphum hi Mizoram Larsap hian Eastern Army Commander a nih lai, January 2010 khan a phum sak a, 4th Assam Rifles te'n Military Civic Action kaltlangin an sa a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Shalom Special School, Serchhip hian vohbik zirlai 36 a nei mek a ni.

title: HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE MINISTER, PI LALRINPUII’N HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT HOSPITAL SAK MEK A HMUNAH ENDIK
content:
392/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 6th May, 2026 :Khum sawmnga awm theihna tur, Hnahthial District Hospital chu Health & Family Welfare Minister, Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin khan a hmunah thlawhin a endik a. Hospital sak hna thawktu, North East Consultancy Services (NECS) te chu an huntiam, kumin December chhung ngei a sa zo hman turin a hrilh.

Minister chuan District Hospital hnuaia hmalakna bakah mamawh awmte chu amah lo dawngsawngtu, Hnahthial District Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati; Sr. CMO, Dr. Lalnunziri leh Medical Superintendent Dr.Zosangliani te nen an sawi hova. Minister chuan Hospital-a thawktu indaih lohna te chu a hriatpui thu sawiin an indaih lohna te chu phuhruk turin theihtawp a hma an lak mek thu a sawi bawk. 50 bedded Hospital sak mek chungchang report tawi chu Minister hmaah hian NECS Managing Director, Pu C.Nunsanga leh Site Engineer, Pu T.Chanropuia te chuan pe in tun dinhmunah chuan Hospital structure chu 70% vel zawh fel a nih tawh thu leh Type –III quarter chu a vaiin 70% vel sak zawh a nih tawh thu an  report a. Type –IV Quarter erawh chu hmanrua dahna tur tha a awm loh avangin duh anga hma an la lak theih loh thu an sawi a ni.

Inkawm hona leh report ngaihthlakna neih a nih hnu hian Minister chuan District Hospital sak mek bakah building hrang hrang awmte chu a hmunah a endik nghal a. A sak hna thawktu, NECS te chu rinawm leh hmantlak ngeia sa tura hrilhin Hospital chu huntiam chhunga sa zo hman ngei turin a hrilh bawk. Hei bakah hian hmanraw dahna tur awm loh avanga Type – IV quarter sak chhunzawm theih loh chu a vei thu sawiin Hospital hmunhma a enfiah hnuah hmun awl deuh lai chu an hmanraw dah nan lo hmang mai turin NECS te chu a hrilh nghal a ni.

District Hospital sak mek a endik hnu hian Minister chuan naktuk lama programme hrang hrang hmang turin Lunglei District a pan nghal a ni.

50 Bedded District Hospital bakah Type-III leh Type –IV quarter te hi North East Special Infrastructure Development Scheme (NESIDS) hnuaia sak niin cheng vaibelchhe sawm paruk (16 cores) estimate a ni a. North East Consultancy Services (NECS) te hian a sak hna hi August 2024 atang khan thawk tan in December ni 25, 2026 a zo hman tura ruahman a ni. NECS hnuaia thawktute hian hnathawktu tur mumal deuh an hmu thin loh avangin hna thawh hi a muan thin thu sawiin tun dinhmunah hian hnathawktu 46 an awm mek niin a sawi bawk.

Hospital bik hi Block A leh Block B ah then niin Basement, Ground Floor leh First Floor a awm dawn a, floor area hi a vaiin 2145.69 sqm vel a ni ang. Drawing-a a lan dangin Block A floor tina room awm turte chu tiang hi an ni :-

Basement : Labour room, Post Natal, Pre Natal, Examination & Preperation, Doctor Room, Nurse room

Ground floor : Office, Server room, Birth& Death registration, Medical record room, Medical Superintendent office, Nursing superintendent office, Store room, Disability centre, ART centre, Nurse changing room

1st floor : Operation Theatre pahnih, Staff room, Doctor room, Pre-operation, Lounge, Post-Operation, Nurse changing room, PAC (Pre-Anaesthesia Check-up) Room

Block B a room awn dan tur chu tiang hi a ni ang :-

Basement : Gynae ward, Medicine ward, Nursing station, Mortuary, CSSD, Blood bank

Ground floor : Pediatric ward, Emergency ward, Minor OT, Examination room, Ortho ward, Eye ward, Nursing station

First floor : Surgery ward, Nursing station, SNCU, HDU, Waiting, Dialysis, Observation recovery room

title: Lungleiah Chief Minister hmuah leh dawnsawn dan tur sawi ho a ni
content:
391/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 6:Mizoram Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma'n May ni 8, 2026 (Zirtawpni)-a Lunglei a tlawh tur chungchangah amah hmuah dan tur leh lo dawnsawn dan tur ngaihtuahin vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaiin a hna thawh pindanah sawrkar official-te an ṭhu khawm.

He hunah hian Chief Minister-in Lunglei a tlawh huna hun hman dan tur ruahman lawk tlangpui thlir ho a ni a. Ven himna lam leh lirthei chet vel dan tur ruahmanna te, medical duty leh service pawimawh hrang hrang ruahmanna te, department leh pawl hrang hrang tih tur leh mawhphurhna te, hlawhtling tak leh tluang taka hun hman a nih theih nana inpuahchahna leh inbuatsaihna tur thil ṭul leh pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

Ruahman lawk dan chuan, Chief Minister hian May ni 8, 2026 (Zirtawpni) chhunah Lunglei thlengin, 2nd Bn MAP Ground leh C. Ṭhuamluaia Mualah NCC Fest & Parasailing Camp a hmanpui ang a. Tlai lamah Civil Hospital Lunglei & Health ATM, Leitlangpui High School & Cosmic Classroom leh hmun pawimawh dangte a tlawh ang a. Lungleiah zan riakin, May ni 9, 2026 (Inrinni) zingah Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Office a tlawh ang a. Tukṭhuan ei khamah Lunglei a chhuahsan ang.

title: MINISTRY OF JAL SHAKTI LEH MIZORAM SORKARIN JAL JEEVAN MISSION (JJM) 2.0 KALPUINA TUR INREMNA (MOU) AN ZIAK. CHIEF MINISTER-IN ONLINE IN TELPUI
content:
391/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th May 2026: Vawiin khan New Delhiah Mizoram sorkar leh Ministry of Jal Shakti, Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation leh Mizoram sorkar chuan Jal Jeevan Mission 2.0 kalpuina tura inremna (Memorandum of Settlement) an ziak a. Delhi atangin Pu CR Paatil, Union Minister of Jal Shakti chuan online-in a telpui a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma leh Prof. Lalnilawma te bakah PHE Officials ten Aizawl atangin online-in an zawm bawk.

New Delhi-ah hian Pi Zodingpuii, IAS, Secretary to the Government of Mizoram chuan Mizoram sorkar aiawhin MoU hi a ziak a. Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation, Government of India aiawhin Pi Swati Meena Naik, Joint Secretary chuan hming a ziak a ni.

Video kaltlanga thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Mizoram chu India rama JJM zaa za tihlawhtling hmasa ber state zinga mi niin chhungkaw 133060 te chu Functional Tap Water Connection kan pe a. Thingtlanga school leh Anganwadi Centre zawng zawngte Functional Tap Water Connection kan pe vek bawk. Water Supply Scheme 852 sanction kan hmuh atangin 849 physical work kan thawk zo tawh a. Physical work hi za zela 99 thawk zo tawh ang kan ni. Water Testing Laboratory hi 28 kan nei tawh bawk. JJM 2.0 atana inremna kan ziak thei hi kan lawm hle a. Nasa takin kan tangkaipui dawn a, Viksit Bharat tihhlawhtlinna pawimawh tak a ni dawn a ni, a ti. Chutihrualin, JJM kalpui tawhtea central share, December 2024 atanga la rawn release loh chu a rang lama release turin a ngen a ni.

title: KHAWZAWL ADDL DC-IN POL LEH LPG DINHMUN CHUNGCHANGAH JOURNALIST-TE PRESS BRIEFING NEIHPUI
content:
390/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 6thMay, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana chuan Khawzawl district chhunga POL leh LPG dinhmun chungchangah Khawzawla journalist-te press briefing a neihpui a. Khawzawl DCSO Pu Patrick Thiandinga pawh he hunah hian a tel a ni.

Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana chuan tunlai khawvel ram thenkhat inkara indona (geo-politics) chuan India ramah tuialhthei (POL) leh ei rawngbawlna gas (LPG) indaihlohna a thlen thu a sawi a. Khawzawl district chhungah POL leh LPG stock lamah harsatna kan neih loh thu sawiin, LPG distributor-te chu an bial chhung consumer-te hnenah bak pe chhuak lo turin thuchhuah siam tawh a nih thu a sawi a. Filling station-te pawh POL harsatna a awm hmaa load la zung zung turin leh motor tanky khat bak uchuak taka burahte pe chhuak lo turin hriattir an ni, a ti a. Mipuite tan POL leh LPG chungchangah harsatna thlenna tur Helpline centre din a nih tawh thu a tarlang bawk.

DCSO Pu Patrick Thiandinga chuan Khawzawla POL leh LPG dinhmun report a pe a. LPG commercial cylinder hi DCSO kaltlangin Directorate-ah dil a ngaia, April thla khan bur 10 pek chhuah a ni a, May thla hian bur 5 pek chhuah tawh niin, NGO, zirna in leh kohhran hman atana pek chhuah a ni. Sawrkar laipui thuchhuahah thingtlang khuaahte (rural) LPG booking inkarah 45 days gap a awm a ngaih avangin supply a tikhaihlak deuh tih tarlangin, Mamawia Indane hi rural atanga urban-a thlak tura hma lak tum a nih thu a tarlang bawk.

Khawzawl district chhungah hian LPG leh POL black-a hralh leh ram danga thawnchhuah report a awm loh thu tarlangin, hetiang thil a thlen loh nan a tul anga ven leh enfiah reng an nih thu a tarlang a.  Petroleum Act, 1934 chuan mimal hman atan chauh license nei lo tan pawh tum khatah petrol litre 30 chin lak emaw khawl a phal a, diesel hi litre 2,500 chin bur khata litre 1000 aia tam lo khawl a phal bawk tih tarlan a ni.

title: MEETING OF LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT MONITORING COMMITTEE FOR HANDHOLDING (BANA KAIH) SCHEME HELD
content:
Lawngtlai, 6th May 2026 :Lawngtlai District Monitoring Committee for Handholding (Bana Kaih) Scheme convened a meeting today at the DC Office Chamber under the chairmanship of Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, Deputy Commissioner and Chairman of the Committee.

In his address, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga highlighted the importance of the “Bana Kaih” scheme, a flagship initiative of the Government of Mizoram, and stressed the crucial role played by Progress Partners, line departments, and the District Monitoring Committee in ensuring its successful implementation. He emphasized that government funds must be utilized effectively and transparently so that the intended beneficiaries receive tangible benefits. Regarding the upcoming Phase-II implementation, he urged the already selected Progress Partners to work with dedication and commitment to achieve meaningful outcomes. He also instructed the implementing departments to closely monitor and supervise the execution of the scheme.

During the meeting, various line departments presented their plans and strategies for the implementation of Phase-II of the Bana Kaih scheme. While acknowledging that there were areas for improvement in Phase-I, the members collectively stressed the need for greater effort and stronger coordination in Phase-II. It was suggested that line departments should more closely monitor their respective Progress Partners, conduct regular field visits, and ensure that success stories are documented and shared with the public.

The Committee further resolved that all line departments under the Bana Kaih scheme should continue to give their best efforts for effective implementation.

The meeting was well attended by all members of the District Monitoring Committee. The session concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

title: CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN NEIHLOH KHAW THAR RUAHMANNA SAWIHO A NI
content:
390/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th May 2026:Vawiin khan CM Conference Hall-ah Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hovin Neihloh Village Planning Committee an thu khawm a. Neihloh khaw thar tur Master Plan thlirhona an nei.

Kan lo tarlan tawh thin angin Neihloh khua hi a khaw puma leilung chetna hmun, khuarel chhiatna avanga him tawk tawh lo a nih avangin an khaw ram chhung hmun danga insuan mai thain a khaw mipuite leh sorkar chuan a hria a. Hmalakna pawh eng emaw chen kalpui tawh a ni. A khaw hmun thar tur an vat fai tawh a, khaw chhung inkalpawhna kawng laih tan tawh a ni a. Mipui nitin mamawh petu Department ten eng emaw chen hma an lo la tawh bawk.

Meeting-ah hian Town & Country Planning, UD & PA chuan Master Plan sawifiahna an nei hmasa a. Survey vawi nga (5) an neih hnua an siam niin khaw thar hi Hectare 60 biala zau tura duan, plot 105 nei, plot tin hi square meter 800 aia zau vek an ni. Plot pakhat chhungah in pakhat bak sak phal loh ni se, in hi sak belh dawn chuan plot tharah zel dah ni se an ti a. A khua hi tihzauh zel theih tura duan a ni.

Master Plan-ah hian vantlang hmunhma pawimawh Community Hall, School, VC House, Biak In, Tanky leh ruahtui khawlna hmun tur te, Solid Waste Management Centre te, Transformer dahna tur te, Parking Area leh Green Area tur te fel fai taka duan vek a ni a. In sak dan tur ruahmanna (Minimum Standard) pawh a keng tel a ni.

Vawiina meeting hian Master Plan hi a thenkhat an siam danglam hnuah a pawm a. Hma latu tur Nodal Agency an ruat nghal a. State Level-ah chuan Planning & Programme Implementation Department te ruat an ni a, District Level-ah Serchhip DC chu ruat a ni.

Neihloh khuaa chhungtinte chu an in thar sakna tur Rs. 15 Lakh pek vek an ni dawn a. Sum leh pai hman belh tur nei ten lian zawk leh tha zawkin an chenna tur in hi an sa ang. In sak dan tur hi a hniam lam bituk (minimum standard) siam sak vek a ni thung. Chhungkaw thenkhatin in sak tan an duh tawh avangin mamawh hmasate chak taka bawhzui ni se an ti.

Neihloh khua hi kum 1898 a din a ni a. Tunah hian chhungkaw 77, mihring 400 chuang hlek an awm mek a. Aizawl Thenzawl Lunglei kawngpui atanga tehin an khaw thar tur hi khaw hlui aiin a hnai zawk a, a ram a tha tawk hle.

Master plan hi pawm a nih chuan Mizoram Urban & Regional Development Act 2025 hnuaia Notification tihchhuah a ni ang a.

Tihhlawhtlin a nih chuan khaw mawi leh fel fai tak, chhuanawm tham ni tura ngaih a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT MONITORING COMMITEE FOR HANDHOLDING (BANA KAIH) SCHEME THUKHAWM
content:
388/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 6th May 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Monitoring Commitee for Handholding (Bana Kaih) chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaii a Office  Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Mizoram Sawrkarin a led nle dp lngaihpawimawh leh chak taka a kalpui mek  'Bana Kaih' tihlawhtling turin Progress Partners leh line department - bakah a viltu tur District Monitoring Committee - te an pawimawh hle a ti a.Sawrkar sum leh pai a th llawna sen ral a nih lohna tur leh a mamawhtuten a taka hlawhtlinna an hmuh ngei theihna tura theihtawp chhuah a tul hle a ti. Phase - II kalpui leh turah Progress Partners - thlanfel tawhte chu hlawhtlinna chang ngei tura thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a fuih a, a bik takin implementing department - te theihtawp chhuaha vil turin a chah nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian Line Department  atangin  'Bana Kaih' Phase - II kalpui tura ruahmanna an neih hrang hrangte sawizauna an nei a. Phase-  I kalpuiah hmasawnna tur leh tan lak ngaihzualna tam tak a awm tih pawm tlangin, Phase - II ah chuan theihtawp chhuah ni se, line department - te pawhin mahni Progress Partners- uluk zawka  vil leh endik thin ni se an ti a.Progress Partners - te hmalakna chu a hmunah ngei kal a vil thin nise, hlawhtlinna changtute pawh mipuite hmuh theih tura tarlan thin ni se tih a ni. Bana Kaih hnuaia Line department- te chuan theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel  se tiin an rel bawk.

Vawiin 'Lawngtlai District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih' thutkhawmah hian Member- te an tel kim tha hle a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga Chairman, Lawngtlai District Monitoring Committee for Bana Kaih, chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.
